title: Kaia Health - Digital Musculoskeletal Therapeutics
problem: Musculoskeletal (MSK) conditions like back pain affect millions but access to physical therapy is limited, expensive, and inconvenient. Opioid over-prescription is a major concern.
solution: FDA-cleared digital therapeutics app combining AI-powered motion tracking, personalized exercise programs, and health coaching for MSK conditions.
technology: Computer vision for movement tracking, AI personalization, mobile app
traction_signals: Covered by multiple US and German insurers
regulatory_notes: FDA-cleared as digital therapeutic. CE marked in Europe.
varden_fit: Low-Moderate — consumer-facing DTx, not clinic infrastructure. However, partnership with MSK specialists on Varden marketplace could be interesting.
notes: Digital therapeutics category leader in MSK. Good example of regulated DTx pathway.
